DB_UNIQUE_VIOLATION: A record with the same value already exists in: {fields}.
DB_UNIQUE_VIOLATION_GENERIC: A record with those unique values already exists.
DB_NOT_FOUND: The requested resource does not exist.
DB_FK_VIOLATION: The operation violates a relationship with another resource (reference in use or nonexistent).
DB_UNKNOWN: An unexpected error occurred while accessing the data.
CONCURRENT_MODIFICATION: This record was modified by someone else since you last read it. Refresh and try again.
